mapper.select: SELECT id, membership_tier_id, role_id, email, password, username, birth_date, status, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at FROM [dbo].[users] WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, membership_tier_id, role_id, email, password, username, birth_date, status, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at FROM [dbo].[users]
